title: MonetDB Mar2025-SP1 crashes at `BLOBlength()`
description:
MonetDB Mar2025-SP1 crashes at `BLOBlength()`.

It can be reproduced on the docker image `monetdb/monetdb:Mar2025-SP1` and `monetdb/dev-builds:default`.
poc: CREATE TABLE table1 (column1 INT, column2 BLOB);
SELECT LAG(column2, 1, column2) OVER () FROM table1;
key_bug_features: Crash occurs during BLOBlength() function execution
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data BLOB, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, description) VALUES (1, NULL, 'Test entry 1');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, description) VALUES (2, 'Sample BLOB data', 'Test entry 2');
SELECT LAG(data, 1, NULL) OVER (ORDER BY id) AS previous_data FROM test_table;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE BLOBlength(data) > 0;
